Deck the Halls with Stunning Christmas and Holiday Lights

Since 2006, we've specialized in providing custom Christmas light installation services to both residential and commercial properties. From elegant designs to commercial property lighting, we've illuminated Atlanta since 2016 with the best lighting trends.

Our team of lighting experts handles every detail — from custom design to professional installation and seasonal removal — so you can enjoy a stunning holiday display without climbing a ladder.

Custom designs tailored to your home or business
Commercial-grade LED lighting for durability and energy savings
Professional installation by trained experts
Hassle-free takedown and storage options
Learn More About Us

Our Holiday Lighting Services

From cozy homes to large commercial properties, we bring holiday magic to every project.

Residential Christmas Lighting

Stay off the ladder this year! Our experts handle every detail — custom designs, professional installation, and removal. Make your home the star of the neighborhood.

Commercial Christmas Lighting

Make your business sparkle with professional Christmas light installation that's safe and stress-free. Attract customers and create a festive atmosphere.

Custom Holiday Designs

Unique, tailored lighting designs that match your vision. From elegant white lights to colorful displays, we create the perfect look for your property.

Lighting Maintenance

If you experience any issues during the season, just call, text, or email us and we'll schedule a repair promptly. We'll replace bulbs at no charge for events.

Professional Installation

We use commercial-grade lighting supplies with custom-fitted lights for each section. All electrical work is handled by our trained team with light-sensitive timers.

Storage & Takedown

After the holidays, we carefully take down your lights. If you purchased your lights, we offer convenient storage for a nominal annual fee.

View All Services

How It Works

From consultation to sparkle — our proven process makes holiday lighting effortless.

01

Quote

Our lighting experts will visit your home to determine the best style and arrangement. Once the design is accepted, you'll get an affordable rate at no charge.

02

Professional Installation

We use commercial-grade lighting supplies with custom-fitted lights for each section. Our team handles all electrical work with timers that turn on at dusk.

03

Maintenance

If any issues arise, simply call, text, or email us and we'll schedule a repair promptly. Bulbs go out during the season — we replace them at no charge.

04

Uninstall & Storage

After New Year's (or earlier upon request), we carefully take down your lights. If you purchased them, we offer convenient storage for a nominal annual fee.

Schedule My Inspection

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about our holiday lighting services.

How much does holiday light installation cost?

Costs vary based on the size of your property, complexity of the design, and type of lights. We provide free, no-obligation estimates. Contact us for a personalized quote.

Do I need to be home for installation?

Not necessarily. Once we've completed the initial consultation and design walk-through, our team can install your lights while you're away. We'll coordinate with you to ensure everything meets your expectations.

What type of lights do you use?

We use commercial-grade LED lights that are energy-efficient, durable, and produce a beautiful, consistent glow. Our lights are professionally rated for outdoor use and designed to last throughout the holiday season.

Do you service commercial properties?

Yes! We provide holiday lighting for businesses, shopping centers, office parks, HOAs, and municipal properties throughout the Atlanta area.

When should I schedule my installation?

We recommend scheduling in early fall (September–October) to secure your preferred installation date. Our installation season typically runs from November through early December.

What happens if a bulb burns out?

It's common for bulbs to go out during the season. Simply call, text, or email us and we'll schedule a repair promptly. If you have a special event or family visiting, just let us know a few days in advance and we'll replace the bulbs at no charge.

View All FAQs

Ready to Have Your Holiday Lights Done for You?

Fill out the contact form, and one of our lighting experts will reach out to you within the hour. You can also reach us during business hours.
